speedup.reason: DEGENERATE: the 42-solve training corpus already contains 5 designs past the bar (corpus best L/D 46.337 vs bar 43.874), so the surrogate-accelerated loop seeds its incumbent past the bar and performs 0 marginal search in every seed. Direct-CFD BO reaches the bar from scratch in {0: 4, 1: 7, 2: 5} marginal evals. Total-cost accounting: surrogate = 42 corpus + 0 marginal; direct = 4 from scratch — the corpus cost dominates. No genuine single-run acceleration is demonstrated; fall back to direct-CFD BO (S7). The bar is reachable by random LHS sampling (direct arms cleared it during init), and surrogate acceleration's payoff is in higher-dimensional / more expensive regimes and amortized across many runs — not this cheap 2-D problem. See the handoff for the fair-test (reduced-prior) design.

verification.V2_tier_cap_reason: 2-grid fallback GCI reached thesis-grade, but Stage-16 3-grid analysis found sub-first-order convergence (order 0.465 < 0.5); capped at validated (ADR-031/032). Thesis-grade rests on the ledgered 393^2 rung.

exploratory_loop.note: exploratory deliverable-2 demonstration; never gates the speed-up S-gates
